allocated_storage.description: Amount of storage allocated for the snapshot in gigabytes

availability_zones.description: List of availability zones where the snapshot is accessible

db_cluster_snapshot_arn.description: Amazon Resource Name for referencing the snapshot in IAM or API operations

engine.description: Database engine used for the Neptune cluster snapshot

engine_version.description: Version of the Neptune database engine for the snapshot

id.description: Unique identifier for the Neptune cluster snapshot

kms_key_id.description: Key ID of the KMS encryption key used for the snapshot

license_model.description: License model associated with the Neptune cluster snapshot

port.description: Port number used to connect to the Neptune cluster snapshot

snapshot_type.description: Type of snapshot, e.g., automated or manual

source_db_cluster_snapshot_arn.description: ARN of the source cluster snapshot from which this snapshot was created

status.description: Current status of the Neptune cluster snapshot

storage_encrypted.description: Indicates whether the snapshot storage is encrypted

vpc_id.description: ID of the VPC associated with the Neptune cluster snapshot
